id.description: VTEX transaction ID. The ID of this transaction must be in the response.

tid.description: Provider transaction ID. The ID of this transaction must be in the response. The anti-fraud provider must generate a unique transaction ID.

code.description: Error code returned from provider. It will be logged in transaction interactions log.

message.description: Error message returned from provider. It will be logged in transaction interactions log.

status.description: Pre-analysis status from provider. Must be `approved` or `denied`.

score.description: Value of the risk score. The maximum value is `100.00`, which means total fraud.
